tasks.title: Create the storyboard_pipeline state table (staged migration)
tasks.dod: Staged migrations/01_create_storyboard_pipeline.{up,down}.sql promote to live 057, apply and revert cleanly against real MySQL; the table has PK(draft_id), the four ENUM(7) phase sub-states, active_run_phase marker, version, phase_started_at/heartbeat_at, cost_estimate/actual_cost and idx_storyboard_pipeline_active_heartbeat.

tasks.title: Build the shared pipeline transition module (pure)
tasks.dod: A pure module (importable by api + worker) exports the transition table, the phase sub-state lifecycle, the strict phase-order guard, the scenes-required guard and the single-active-run/version-CAS decision; unit tests cover every legal and illegal transition with no DB.

tasks.title: Implement the storyboard_pipeline repository (row + CAS + stuck query)
tasks.dod: storyboardPipeline.repository.ts reads/writes the row by draft_id, claims a run via an active_run_phase CAS, bumps version, updates the heartbeat, and runs the over-bound stuck-phase age query; integration tests hit real MySQL.

tasks.title: Resume read: auto-start scene generation + lazy stuck-release
tasks.dod: getPipelineState returns the projected state, lazily creates the row and auto-starts scene generation on a fresh unplanned draft, and lazy-releases an over-bound running phase to failed; integration tests assert auto-start, resume-to-running/modal, and lazy release.

tasks.title: Server-side cost estimate compute + re-validate
tasks.dod: The service computes and re-validates the reference-image and scene-image cost estimates server-side and persists cost_estimate; a client-supplied estimate is never trusted; unit tests cover the compute and the re-validation rejection.

tasks.title: Confirm-cast: create references below music, idempotent run claim
tasks.dod: confirmCast re-validates the estimate, inserts reference blocks at sort_order > MAX(music.sort_order), claims the run, and enqueues reference-image generation; a repeated confirm returns the existing run with zero duplicate blocks; integration tests assert below-music ordering and idempotency.

tasks.title: Trigger phase: order guard, scenes-required guard, incremental re-trigger
tasks.dod: triggerPhase starts/re-triggers a phase, blocks out-of-order (pipeline.phase_out_of_order) and scenes-required (pipeline.scenes_required), accepts the scene-image offer, and re-enqueues only non-terminal units on re-trigger; integration tests assert the guards and that done units are not re-enqueued.

tasks.title: Cancel + skip use cases (keep partials, skipped != idle)
tasks.dod: cancelPhase clears the run, enqueues no new units, keeps every done unit and returns idle; skipPhase records skipped distinct from idle and stays re-triggerable; integration tests assert partial-keep and the skipped!=idle distinction.

tasks.title: Pipeline routes + controller (ownership-before-prerequisite, error codes)
tasks.dod: Routes + controller expose GET state / confirm-cast / trigger / cancel / skip with Zod validation, assert draft ownership before any prerequisite/order check (opaque 404 for non-owners), and map the new pipeline.* codes; controller integration tests assert deny-and-hide and the 422 gate codes.

tasks.title: Worker completion-hooks advance phases via the transition module
tasks.dod: The scene-plan, cast-extract, reference-image and scene-image jobs record per-unit terminal state and, when all units of a phase are terminal, run the shared transition (version CAS) to advance the phase and publish; integration tests assert scene->reference-data->awaiting-review and per-unit->phase advance.

tasks.title: Reaper repeatable job: release stuck phases
tasks.dod: storyboardPipelineReaper.job.ts is a BullMQ repeatable that marks over-bound running phases failed, sets error_message, clears the run, bumps version and publishes state; an integration test seeds a stuck row and asserts release.

tasks.title: Scene-image generation: references feed scenes + text-only fallback
tasks.dod: Scene-image generation feeds a scene's Ready linked reference outputs (AC-10) and falls back to text-only when no Ready reference exists (AC-11); a per-scene failure is recorded and the phase completes regardless; integration tests cover both branches and the failure-tolerant completion.

tasks.title: Instrument actual cost + estimate-vs-actual delta
tasks.dod: Each expensive-phase run records actual_cost on the pipeline row and emits the estimate-vs-actual delta to telemetry; an integration test asserts actual_cost is persisted and the delta metric is emitted.

tasks.title: Wire realtime publish + mount routes + register reaper
tasks.dod: Every transition publishes the full projected PipelineState on storyboard.status.updated (version-stamped); the pipeline routes are mounted in the api app and the reaper repeatable is registered in the worker bootstrap; an integration test asserts a transition emits one version-monotonic event.

tasks.title: usePipelineState hook + retire client orchestration
tasks.dod: usePipelineState fetches GET state and subscribes to storyboard.status.updated, ignoring any event whose version <= the version held; the useStoryboardPlanGeneration / useStoryboardIllustrations / useCastAutostart hooks and the StoryboardAutomationPhase enum are removed; hook tests assert resume and the version-ignore guard.

tasks.title: BlockingLoader component (full-screen, labelled, cancel)
tasks.dod: The full-screen blocking loader renders payload.loader_label, exposes a cancel control wired to cancelPhase, and releases when state becomes failed/idle; component tests cover the label render, cancel, and release.

tasks.title: ReviewCastProposalModal (reuse CastConfirmModal)
tasks.dod: The modal reuses the existing CastConfirmModal primitives, lists each proposed reference with its AI-selected scenes and the reference-image cost estimate, confirms via confirmCast and skips via skipPhase; component tests cover render, confirm and skip.

tasks.title: SceneImageOfferModal (cost estimate, accept/skip)
tasks.dod: The modal shows the scene-image cost estimate, accepts via triggerPhase(scene_image) and skips via skipPhase; component tests cover accept and skip.

tasks.title: StepCorners corner controls + plain-language guard messages
tasks.dod: The corner controls trigger any phase via triggerPhase and surface the server's plain-language out-of-order / scenes-required messages (reusing ReferenceGateMessage); component tests assert the trigger and the two guard messages.

tasks.title: End-to-end + resume/authz regression coverage
tasks.dod: Integration + e2e-through-UI coverage of the full happy path (AC-01->04), resume/observer-tab convergence (AC-05), cancel + incremental re-trigger (AC-06) and authz deny-and-hide (AC-13) is green against real MySQL.

tasks.title: Deploy cut-over: migrate in-flight old-flow drafts (OQ-2)
tasks.dod: A one-time cut-over seeds a storyboard_pipeline row for every in-flight old-flow draft (queued/running Scene planning / Illustration status jobs) and the retired statuses/logic are removed; a dry-run on a dev DB snapshot shows every in-flight draft resolves to a valid pipeline state with no orphaned jobs.
